file_insights.changes: Implemented list_cards_watch() function with notify watcher pattern and redraw loop for real-time card status monitoring
file_insights.significance: Core functionality for spec 025 (bop-status-watch); enables filesystem-driven TUI updates without polling

file_insights.changes: Documented completion of 13 subtasks across 5 phases; added implementation notes for connectivity probe and transient retry logic
file_insights.significance: Phase 5 integration testing complete; spec 024 ready for QA sign-off

file_insights.changes: Created QA rejection report identifying missing network error check in adapters (claude.nu, codex.nu)
file_insights.significance: Blocking issue: adapters have network error patterns defined but don't call helper function to exit 75 on network errors

file_insights.changes: Updated plan tracking for list_cards_watch() subtask completion

file_insights.significance: Workflow state update reflecting completed sleep/wake/network resilience spec

patterns_discovered.pattern: Async filesystem watcher with debounced redraw loop
patterns_discovered.context: list_cards_watch() uses notify crate to detect card state changes (.cards directory mutations) and triggers TUI redraws
patterns_discovered.benefit: Event-driven updates eliminate polling overhead; responsive to filesystem changes

patterns_discovered.pattern: Provider connectivity probe before adapter spawn
patterns_discovered.context: Dispatcher checks TCP reachability to provider endpoints (api.anthropic.com:443, api.openai.com:443) with 2-second timeout before executing card
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents wasted adapter spawns when provider is unreachable; enables graceful requeue to pending/

patterns_discovered.pattern: Network error detection with multiple pattern matching (14 adapter + 28 dispatcher patterns)
patterns_discovered.context: Adapters define NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS for stderr matching; dispatcher fallback checks connection timeouts, DNS failures, SSL errors, etc.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Robust network failure categorization; enables exit code 75 semantic (transient vs logic errors)

patterns_discovered.pattern: Transient failure auto-retry with budget and cooldown
patterns_discovered.context: Cards retry max 3 times per dispatch episode with 30-second cooldown; counter resets on success
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic recovery from temporary network hiccups without requiring manual intervention

patterns_discovered.pattern: Opt-out safety mechanism via providers.json configuration
patterns_discovered.context: Connectivity probe defaults to true (enabled); users can set 'probe': false in providers.json for air-gapped deployments
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexibility for different deployment scenarios without code changes

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Network error patterns require careful case-insensitive matching
gotchas_discovered.context: Adapters check stderr for patterns like 'rate limit', 'Rate Limit', 'RATE LIMIT'; helpers use str contains --ignore-case for robustness
gotchas_discovered.impact: Inconsistent pattern matching can miss legitimate transient errors, causing false card failures

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: File watcher events must be debounced to avoid excessive redraws
gotchas_discovered.context: list_cards_watch() must filter rapid consecutive events (e.g., symlink+file write from atomic rename operations) to prevent UI flicker
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unbounded redraw loop can consume excessive CPU and cause UI jank in high-throughput scenarios

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Adapters defined network error patterns but didn't call is_network_error() helper
gotchas_discovered.context: claude.nu and codex.nu lines 79-90 have NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant and is_network_error function defined, but main exit logic only checks rate-limit patterns
gotchas_discovered.impact: QA detected acceptance criterion failure: 'Adapters exit 75 on network errors' not fully implemented; requires 4-line fix to both files

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Provider connectivity probe returns true for unknown providers
gotchas_discovered.context: provider_reachable() function uses permissive default (true) for providers not in [claude, codex, opencode, ollama-local]
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unknown providers will always proceed; if custom provider is added without probe endpoint, probe is effectively disabled for that provider

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: TCP probe overhead is non-blocking but still adds latency per card
gotchas_discovered.context: 2-second timeout per provider_reachable() call; if provider is down, 2s delay before requeue to pending/
gotchas_discovered.impact: High card throughput deployments may accumulate probe latency; should implement connection pooling or concurrent probes across providers

approach_outcome.description: Create list_cards_watch() function with notify watcher and redraw loop
key_achievements: Implemented event-driven card status watching using notify crate
Integrated filesystem watcher into list_cards_watch() function
Implemented connectivity probe with opt-out mechanism
Wrote 600-line comprehensive result.md documentation covering all 11 acceptance criteria

recommendations.recommendation: Fix QA-requested adapter network error check
recommendations.details: Add is_network_error($stderr_text) check before rate-limit check in adapters/claude.nu and adapters/codex.nu (lines 79-90). Estimated 5-10 minutes. Must complete before QA sign-off.

recommendations.recommendation: Optimize provider connectivity probe for high-throughput deployments
recommendations.details: Consider connection pooling or concurrent probes across multiple providers to reduce per-card latency overhead. Current 2-second timeout is appropriate but sequential probing can become bottleneck at scale.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement debouncing in list_cards_watch() redraw loop
recommendations.details: Filter rapid consecutive filesystem events (debounce window: 50-100ms) to prevent UI flicker from atomic rename operations (.cards/pending/ID → .cards/running/ID generates symlink + file write events)

Current connectivity probe hardcodes endpoints (api.anthropic.com:443, api.openai.com:443). Consider reading from providers.json or environment to support custom provider URLs and self-hosted LLM endpoints.

recommendations.recommendation: Document watch loop filesystem event filtering strategy
recommendations.details: Add notes to list.rs docstring explaining which events are observed (directory mutations, file state changes) and which are filtered (rapid duplicates, unrelated paths).

recommendations.recommendation: Extend connectivity probe to Linux D-Bus/systemd-resolved
recommendations.details: Current macOS IOKit implementation is complete. Linux probe stub is noted as future work in output/result.md. Recommend implementing netlink-based reachability check for Linux compatibility.
